mapper.update: UPDATE t_wf_task SET status = #{status}, version = version + 1, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND version = #{version}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM t_wf_task WHERE assignee_id = #{assigneeId} AND status = 0 ORDER BY created_time DESC
SELECT * FROM t_wf_task WHERE assignee_id = #{assigneeId} AND status IN (1, 2, 4) ORDER BY action_time DESC
